channel.title: IA on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in IA on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) TFM: Iowa Department of Public Safety (IA)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Iowa Department of Public Safety.

Model: TFM Signed: March 26, 2025 County: N/A State: IA FIPS: unresolved

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: Hardin Co Jail — Hardin, IA
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Hardin Co Jail in Hardin County, IA.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: Woodbury County Jail — Woodbury, IA
